---
title: "01-Preprocessing-MJNS"
output: html_document
---
# Packages

```{r load-packages}
library(CommuteCA)
library(dplyr) # A Grammar of Data Manipulation
library(here) # Enables easy file referencing in project-oriented workflows
library(tidyr) # Tools for tidying data: reshaping, pivoting, separating, and uniting columns
library(Hmisc)
library(ordinal)
library(survey)
library(texreg)
library(robustbase)
library(quantreg)
library(boot)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(nngeo)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

reading data: 

```{r}
files_address <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/MJ-Survey/ns_data_re.csv")
mjsurvey <- read.csv(files_address, header = TRUE)
mjsurvey_backup <- mjsurvey
```

```{r}
files_address <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/MJ-Survey/Household_Members_Data_2025-04-16.csv")
mjsurvey_household <- read.csv(files_address, header = TRUE)
```

```{r}
files_address <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/input/census_spatial_keys.csv")

keys <- read.csv(files_address, header = TRUE, 
               colClasses = c("character", "character","character", "character", "character",
                              "character","character"))
```

```{r read-accessibility}
# Folder  
measures_folder <- paste0(here::here(),"/data-raw/output/GTAH/CT/spatial-filter-measures/")


# Read file
Accessibilities <- read.csv(paste0(measures_folder, "spatial_filters.csv"), 
               colClasses = c("character", "character", 
                              "numeric","numeric",
                              "numeric","numeric",
                              "numeric","numeric", 
                              "numeric","numeric" )) %>% 
  mutate(PwMode_label = case_when(
    PwMode_label == "Car-motor" ~ "Car_motor",
    TRUE ~ PwMode_label ))
```


Reading the dissemination area geometries:

```{r}
directory_spatial_files <- paste0(here(), "/data-raw/output/GTAH/spatial-files/") # Update this address if necessary
census_tracts <-   st_read(paste0(directory_spatial_files, "census_tracts.shp"))
census_tracts <- nngeo::st_remove_holes(census_tracts)
```

Reading the census division geometries:

```{r}
census_divisions <- st_read(paste0(directory_spatial_files, "census_divisions.shp"))
census_divisions <- nngeo::st_remove_holes(census_divisions)

census_divisions <- census_divisions %>% 
  mutate(PCD = substr(CDUID, 0, 4),
         pcd_label = case_when(PCD == "3518" ~ "Durham", 
                               PCD == "3519" ~ "York", 
                               PCD == "3520" ~ "Toronto", 
                               PCD == "3521" ~ "Peel", 
                               PCD == "3524" ~ "Halton", 
                               PCD == "3525" ~ "Hamilton"))
```

Setting folders to export files:

```{r directory-export}
diretorio_export <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/output/GTAH/CT/standards-measures-per-person/") # Update the address to export the data, if necessary

if(!dir.exists(diretorio_export)){
  dir.create(diretorio_export, recursive = TRUE)}

diretorio_export_images <- paste0(here(),"/data-raw/output/GTAH/CT/standards-figures-per-person/") # Update the address to export the data, if necessary

if(!dir.exists(diretorio_export_images)){
  dir.create(diretorio_export_images, recursive = TRUE)
  
  dir.create(paste0(diretorio_export_images,
                    "/linear/all/"), recursive = TRUE)
  dir.create(paste0(diretorio_export_images,
                    "/linear/sig/"), recursive = TRUE) 
  dir.create(paste0(diretorio_export_images,
                    "/ordinal/"), recursive = TRUE)
}
```



# Pre-processing: 

- *pe_agreeWithDeclineEmploymentOpportunitiesDueToTransport*: Declining employment opportunities because of transport situation (0: Disagree; 100: Agree) -  quanto mais, pior

- *pe_tooFewJobsInMyIdealCommutingTime*: Job availability with ideal commute 
time (0: Disagree; 100: Agree) -  quanto mais, pior

- *pe_tooLongToTravelToWork*: Travel to work too long (0: Disagree; 100: Agree) -  quanto mais, pior

- *pe_easilyReachWork*: Activity participation: Work (0: Disagree; 100: Agree)

```{r}
# Declining employment opportunities because of transport situation 
LS_DeclineEmployment <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(fexp_final, X_activePersonId,pe_agreeWithDeclineEmploymentOpportunitiesDueToTransport) %>% 
  filter(!pe_agreeWithDeclineEmploymentOpportunitiesDueToTransport %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(DeclineEmployment = as.numeric(pe_agreeWithDeclineEmploymentOpportunitiesDueToTransport)) %>% 
  filter(DeclineEmployment >= 0) %>%
  mutate(DeclineEmployment_Likert = 
           cut(DeclineEmployment,
               breaks = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(DeclineEmployment, weights = fexp_final, probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)), 
               labels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         DeclineEmployment_Likert = factor(DeclineEmployment_Likert, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

# Few job availability with ideal commute 
LS_FewJobs <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(fexp_final, X_activePersonId,pe_tooFewJobsInMyIdealCommutingTime) %>% 
  filter(!pe_tooFewJobsInMyIdealCommutingTime %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(FewJobs = as.numeric(pe_tooFewJobsInMyIdealCommutingTime)) %>% 
  filter(FewJobs >= 0) %>%
  mutate(FewJobs_Likert = 
           cut(FewJobs,
               breaks = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(FewJobs, weights = fexp_final, probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)), 
               labels = c("Most Positive", "Positive", "Neutral", "Negative", "Most Negative"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         FewJobs_Likert = factor(FewJobs_Likert, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

# Travel to work too long 
LS_TravelTooLong <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(fexp_final, X_activePersonId,pe_tooLongToTravelToWork) %>% 
  filter(!pe_tooLongToTravelToWork %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TravelTooLong = as.numeric(pe_tooLongToTravelToWork)) %>% 
  filter(TravelTooLong >= 0) %>%
  mutate(TravelTooLong_Likert = 
           cut(TravelTooLong,
               breaks = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(TravelTooLong, weights = fexp_final, probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)), 
               labels =c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         TravelTooLong_Likert = factor(TravelTooLong_Likert, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

# Easy to go work
LS_EasyToGo <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select( fexp_final,  X_activePersonId,pe_easilyReachWork) %>% 
  filter(!pe_easilyReachWork %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(EasyToGo = as.numeric(pe_easilyReachWork)) %>% 
  filter(EasyToGo >= 0) %>%
  mutate(EasyToGo_Likert = 
           cut(EasyToGo,
               breaks = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(EasyToGo, weights = fexp_final, probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)), 
               labels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         EasyToGo_Likert = factor(EasyToGo_Likert, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

# Easy to go work
LS_EasyToGo <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select( fexp_final,  X_activePersonId,pe_easilyReachWork) %>% 
  filter(!pe_easilyReachWork %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(EasyToGo = as.numeric(pe_easilyReachWork)) %>% 
  filter(EasyToGo >= 0) %>%
  mutate(EasyToGo_Likert = 
           cut(EasyToGo,
               breaks = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(EasyToGo, weights = fexp_final, probs = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1)), 
               labels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
               include.lowest = TRUE), 
         EasyToGo_Likert = factor(EasyToGo_Likert, 
                                              levels = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"),
             ordered = TRUE))

# Public Transit Variables

## TransportSatisfaction (***)
LS_TransportSatisfaction <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_transportSatisfaction) %>% 
  filter(!pe_transportSatisfaction %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransportSatisfaction = as.numeric(pe_transportSatisfaction)) %>% 
  filter(TransportSatisfaction >= 0)

## TransitWaitTime (***)
LS_TransitWaitTime <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit) %>% 
  filter(!pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitWaitTime = as.numeric(pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit)) %>% 
  filter(TransitWaitTime >= 0)

## TransitReliable (***)
LS_TransitReliable <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitReliable = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable)) %>% 
  filter(TransitReliable >= 0)

## TransitPractical (***)
LS_TransitPractical <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitPractical = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical)) %>% 
  filter(TransitPractical >= 0)

## TransitTimeSave (***)
LS_TransitTimeSave <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitTimeSave = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving)) %>% 
  filter(TransitTimeSave >= 0)

## Forced to have a car
LS_ForcedCar <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar) %>% 
  filter(!pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(ForcedCar = as.numeric(pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar)) %>% 
  filter(ForcedCar >= 0)

# Public Transit Variables

## Work by Transit (****)
LS_WorkbyTransit <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit) %>% 
  filter(!p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit %in% ("")) %>% 
  mutate(WorkbyTransit = factor(p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit, levels= c("almostNever","lessThan1TimeWeek", "1TimeWeek",
                                                  "2TimesWeek", "3TimesWeek",
                                                  "4TimesWeek" , "5TimesWeekOrMore"), ordered = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(WorkbyTransit_count = case_when(
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "almostNever" ~ 0,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "lessThan1TimeWeek" ~ 0,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "1TimeWeek" ~ 1,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "2TimesWeek" ~ 2,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "3TimesWeek" ~ 3,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "4TimesWeek" ~ 4,
      p_averageTimesGoWorkplaceTransit == "5TimesWeekOrMore" ~ 5)) 


## TransportSatisfaction (***)
LS_TransportSatisfaction <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_transportSatisfaction) %>% 
  filter(!pe_transportSatisfaction %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransportSatisfaction = as.numeric(pe_transportSatisfaction)) %>% 
  filter(TransportSatisfaction >= 0)

## TransitWaitTime (***)
LS_TransitWaitTime <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit) %>% 
  filter(!pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitWaitTime = as.numeric(pe_tooLongwaitTimeForTransit)) %>% 
  filter(TransitWaitTime >= 0)

## TransitReliable (***)
LS_TransitReliable <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitReliable = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsReliable)) %>% 
  filter(TransitReliable >= 0)

## TransitPractical (***)
LS_TransitPractical <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitPractical = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsPractical)) %>% 
  filter(TransitPractical >= 0)

## TransitTimeSave (***)
LS_TransitTimeSave <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving) %>% 
  filter(!pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(TransitTimeSave = as.numeric(pe_thinkPublicTransportIsTimeSaving)) %>% 
  filter(TransitTimeSave >= 0)

## Forced to have a car
LS_ForcedCar <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(X_activePersonId,pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar) %>% 
  filter(!pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar %in% c("na","")) %>% 
  mutate(ForcedCar = as.numeric(pe_agreeWithFeelForcedToOwnCar)) %>% 
  filter(ForcedCar >= 0)

outcomes_std <- mjsurvey %>% dplyr::select(interview_id, X_activePersonId, fexp_final) %>% 
  left_join(LS_DeclineEmployment %>% dplyr::select(-fexp_final) , by = "X_activePersonId") %>% 
  left_join(LS_FewJobs %>% dplyr::select(-fexp_final) , by = "X_activePersonId") %>% 
  left_join(LS_TravelTooLong %>% dplyr::select(-fexp_final), by = "X_activePersonId") %>% 
  left_join(LS_EasyToGo %>% dplyr::select(-fexp_final), by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_WorkbyTransit, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_TransportSatisfaction, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_TransitWaitTime, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_TransitReliable, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_TransitPractical, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_TransitTimeSave, by = "X_activePersonId") %>%
  left_join(LS_ForcedCar, by = "X_activePersonId")
```

Control variables: 

```{r}
control_var <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(interview_id, 
                X_activePersonId,
                fexp_final, 
                DAUID_ADIDU,
                t_householdCarNumber,
                t_householdBikeNumber,
                t_driverLicense,
                t_monthlyOrAnnualTransitPass,
                t_transitIsAvailable,
                t_useParatransitServices, 
                s_genderIdentity, # 
                s_highestEducationLevel, # 
                s_bornInCanada, 
                s_firstNationsMetisOrInuit, 
                s_ethnicity, # 
                s_canadianStatus, # 
                s_longTermConditionsDifficultySeeing, 
                s_longTermConditionsDifficultyHearing, 
                s_longTermConditionsDifficultyWalking, 
                s_longTermConditionsDifficultyLearning,           
                s_emotionalPsychologicalMentalConditions, 
                s_age,
                hh_size, 
                hh_householdIncome) %>% 
  mutate(hh_income = case_when(hh_householdIncome == "000000_009999" ~ "Less than $30,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "010000_019999" ~ "Less than $30,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "020000_029999" ~ "Less than $30,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "030000_039999" ~ "$30,000 to $60,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "040000_049999" ~ "$30,000 to $60,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "050000_059999" ~ "$30,000 to $60,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "060000_069999" ~ "$60,000 to $90,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "070000_079999" ~ "$60,000 to $90,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "080000_089999" ~ "$60,000 to $90,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "090000_119999" ~ "$90,000 to $120,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "120000_149999" ~ "$120,000 to $150,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "150000_179999" ~ "$150,000 to $180,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "180000_209999" ~ "$180,000 to $210,000", 
                               hh_householdIncome == "210000_999999" ~ "More than $210,000", 
    ),
    hh_income = factor(hh_income, levels = c("Less than $30,000",
                                             "$30,000 to $60,000", 
                                             "$60,000 to $90,000", 
                                             "$90,000 to $120,000", 
                                             "$150,000 to $180,000", 
                                             "$180,000 to $210,000", 
                                             "More than $210,000")), 
    DriverLicense = case_when(
      t_driverLicense == "yes" ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    DriverLicense = factor(DriverLicense, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    TransitPass = case_when(
      t_monthlyOrAnnualTransitPass == "yes" ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    TransitPass = factor(TransitPass, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    TransitAvailable = case_when(
      t_transitIsAvailable == "yes" ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    TransitAvailable = factor(TransitAvailable, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Paratransit = case_when(
      t_useParatransitServices == "yes" ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    Paratransit = factor(Paratransit, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Indigenous = case_when(
      s_firstNationsMetisOrInuit == "yes" ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    Indigenous = factor(Indigenous, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Non_White = case_when(
      s_ethnicity == "white" ~ "No",
     TRUE ~ "Yes"
    ),
    Non_White = factor(Non_White, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Temporary_or_refugee = case_when(
      s_canadianStatus %in% c("temporaryResident", "refugeeAsylumSeeker") ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
     ),
    Temporary_or_refugee = factor(Temporary_or_refugee, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    LongTermConditions = case_when(
      s_longTermConditionsDifficultySeeing %in% c("often", "always") |  
        s_longTermConditionsDifficultyHearing %in% c("often", "always") |  
        s_longTermConditionsDifficultyWalking %in% c("often", "always") |  
        s_longTermConditionsDifficultyLearning %in% c("often", "always") |  
        s_emotionalPsychologicalMentalConditions %in% c("often", "always") ~ "Yes",
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    LongTermConditions = factor(LongTermConditions, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Immigrant = case_when(
      s_bornInCanada == "yes" ~ "Yes",  # Born in Canada = not immigrant
     TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    Immigrant = factor(Immigrant, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    Woman = case_when(
      s_genderIdentity %in% c("woman", "transWoman") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    ),
    Woman = factor(Woman, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    
    twoSTQI = case_when(
      s_genderIdentity %in% c("woman", "man") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ "Yes"
    ),
    twoSTQI = factor(twoSTQI, levels = c("No", "Yes")), 
    
    CarNumber = t_householdCarNumber, 
    BikeNumber = t_householdBikeNumber,
    Age = s_age) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(t_driverLicense, t_monthlyOrAnnualTransitPass, 
            t_transitIsAvailable, t_useParatransitServices,
            s_firstNationsMetisOrInuit, s_ethnicity,
            s_canadianStatus, s_longTermConditionsDifficultySeeing,
            s_longTermConditionsDifficultyHearing, s_longTermConditionsDifficultyWalking,
            s_longTermConditionsDifficultyLearning, s_emotionalPsychologicalMentalConditions,
            s_bornInCanada, 
            s_genderIdentity))

summary(control_var)
```

Household: 

```{r}
child_number <- mjsurvey_household %>% 
  mutate(people = 1) %>%
  group_by(interview_id) %>% 
  summarise(Child_under_10 = sum(people[age <= 10]))


control_var <- control_var %>% 
  left_join(child_number, by = "interview_id")
```

```{r}
accessibilities_wide <- Accessibilities %>%
  rename(SA = SA_im, 
         HT = HT_im,
         SA_nonc = SA_nonc_im, 
         SA_pp = SA_pp_im) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = CTUID,
              names_from = PwMode_label, 
              values_from = c(SA, Sf_dist_SA, SA_nonc, Sf_dist_SA_nonc, HT, Sf_dist_HT, SA_pp, Sf_dist_SA_pp),
              names_sep = "_")
```

```{r}
census_tracts <- census_tracts %>% 
  mutate(Pop_density = Population/LANDAREA)
```

```{r}
keys <- keys %>% 
  mutate(DAUID = as.numeric(DAUID))

geo_vars <- mjsurvey %>% 
  dplyr::select(interview_id, 
                X_activePersonId,
                DAUID_ADIDU) %>% 
  rename(DAUID = DAUID_ADIDU) %>% 
  left_join(keys, by = "DAUID") %>% 
  left_join(accessibilities_wide, by = "CTUID") %>%
  left_join(census_tracts %>% dplyr::select(CTUID, Pop_density),
            by = "CTUID") 

```


```{r}
code <- c(
           "3518", # Durham
           "3519", # York
          "3520" ,  # Toronto
           "3521", # Peel
           "3524", # Halton
           "3525" # Hamilton
          ) 

respondents <- geo_vars %>% 
  left_join(control_var, by = c("interview_id", "X_activePersonId")) %>% 
  left_join(outcomes_std %>% dplyr::select(-fexp_final), by = c("interview_id", "X_activePersonId")) %>% 
  filter(PCD %in% code) %>% 
  mutate(fexp_scaled = fexp_final / mean(fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE))%>% 
  filter(!is.na(CTUID), !is.na(SA_Walk), !is.na(hh_income))
```

# Regressions: First stage

## Four modes 

We will start the first stage of regression by creating a formula to regress accessibility based on spatial filters and other variables. 

```{r}
design_respondents <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,  # No clustering
  weights = ~fexp_final,
  data = respondents)

stage1_formula_SA <- as.formula(
  Accessibility ~ Sf_dist_SA_Walk + Sf_dist_SA_Bike + Sf_dist_SA_Transit + `Sf_dist_SA_Car_motor` +
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density)

stage1_formula_SA_nonc <- as.formula(
  Accessibility ~ Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Walk + Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Bike + Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Transit + `Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Car_motor` +
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density)

stage1_formula_SA_pp <- as.formula(
  Accessibility ~ Sf_dist_SA_pp_Walk + Sf_dist_SA_pp_Bike + Sf_dist_SA_pp_Transit + `Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Car_motor` +
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density)

stage1_formula_HT <- as.formula(
  Accessibility ~ Sf_dist_HT_Walk + Sf_dist_HT_Bike + Sf_dist_HT_Transit + `Sf_dist_HT_Car_motor` +
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density)

```

Creating the first stage for walking accessibility: 

```{r}
stage1_walk_SA <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA, SA_Walk ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_walk_SA, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_walk_HT <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_HT, HT_Walk ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_walk_HT, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_walk_SA_nonc <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_nonc, SA_nonc_Walk ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_walk_SA_nonc, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_walk_SA_pp <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_pp, SA_pp_Walk ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_walk_SA_pp, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

Creating the first stage for cycling accessibility: 

```{r}
stage1_bike_SA <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA, SA_Bike ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_bike_SA, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_bike_SA_nonc <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_nonc, SA_nonc_Bike ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_bike_SA_nonc, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_bike_SA_pp <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_pp, SA_pp_Bike ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_bike_SA_pp, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_bike_HT <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_HT, HT_Bike ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_bike_HT, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

Creating the first stage for transit accessibility: 

```{r}
stage1_transit_SA <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA, SA_Transit ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_transit_SA, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_transit_SA_nonc <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_nonc, SA_nonc_Transit ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_transit_SA_nonc, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_transit_SA_pp <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_pp, SA_pp_Transit ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_transit_SA_pp, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_transit_HT <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_HT, HT_Transit ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_transit_HT, diagnostics = TRUE)
```


Creating the first stage for Car-motorized accessibility: 

```{r}
stage1_car_SA <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA, `SA_Car_motor` ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_car_SA, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_car_SA_nonc <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_nonc, `SA_nonc_Car_motor` ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_car_SA_nonc, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_car_SA_pp <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_SA_pp, `SA_pp_Car_motor` ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_car_SA_pp, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

```{r}
stage1_car_HT <- svyglm(update(stage1_formula_HT, `HT_Car_motor` ~ .), design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_car_HT, diagnostics = TRUE)
```

## General  

```{r}
stage1_general_HT <- svyglm(HT_General ~ Sf_dist_HT_General+ 
                              
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density, design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_general_HT)
```

```{r}
stage1_general_SA <- svyglm(SA_General ~ Sf_dist_SA_General+ 
                              
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density, design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_general_SA)
```

```{r}
stage1_general_SA_nonc <- svyglm(SA_nonc_General ~ Sf_dist_SA_nonc_General+ 
                              
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density, design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_general_SA_nonc)
```


```{r}
stage1_general_SA_pp <- svyglm(SA_pp_General ~ Sf_dist_SA_pp_General+ 
                              
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size  + hh_income + Pop_density, design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_general_SA_pp)
```

## Three modes  

```{r}
stage1_active_HT <- svyglm(HT_Active ~ Sf_dist_HT_Active + 
                             Sf_dist_HT_Transit + 
                             `Sf_dist_HT_Car_motor` + 
                              
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size +
                                hh_income + 
                                Pop_density, 
  design = design_respondents)

summary(stage1_active_HT)
```

```{r}
stage1_active_SA <- svyglm(SA_Active ~ Sf_dist_SA_Active + 
                              Sf_dist_SA_Transit + 
                             `Sf_dist_SA_Car_motor` + 
                             
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size + 
                                hh_income + 
                                Pop_density,  
  design = design_respondents)


summary(stage1_active_SA)
```

```{r}
stage1_active_SA_nonc <- svyglm(SA_nonc_Active ~ Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Active + 
                              Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Transit + 
                             `Sf_dist_SA_nonc_Car_motor` + 
                             
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size + 
                                hh_income + 
                                Pop_density, 
  design = design_respondents)


summary(stage1_active_SA_nonc)
```

```{r}
stage1_active_SA_pp <- svyglm(SA_pp_Active ~ Sf_dist_SA_pp_Active + 
                              Sf_dist_SA_pp_Transit + 
                             `Sf_dist_SA_pp_Car_motor` + 
                             
                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                DriverLicense + 
                                TransitPass + 
                                Paratransit + 
                                
                                ## Socio and demographic variables
                                Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                Child_under_10 +
                                hh_size + 
                                hh_income + 
                                Pop_density, 
  design = design_respondents)


summary(stage1_active_SA_pp)
```

Adding the residuals to the data frame: 
```{r}
respondents <- respondents %>%
  mutate(
    # SA Mode
    SA_Walk_IV = predict(stage1_walk_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_Bike_IV = predict(stage1_bike_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_Transit_IV = predict(stage1_transit_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_Car_IV = predict(stage1_car_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_Walk_Res_IV = SA_Walk - SA_Walk_IV,  
    SA_Bike_Res_IV = SA_Bike - SA_Bike_IV,  
    SA_Transit_Res_IV = SA_Transit - SA_Transit_IV,  
    SA_Car_Res_IV = `SA_Car_motor` - SA_Car_IV,  
    
    # SA non-competitive Mode
    SA_nonc_Walk_IV = predict(stage1_walk_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_Bike_IV = predict(stage1_bike_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_Transit_IV = predict(stage1_transit_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_Car_IV = predict(stage1_car_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_Walk_Res_IV = SA_nonc_Walk - SA_nonc_Walk_IV,  
    SA_nonc_Bike_Res_IV = SA_nonc_Bike - SA_nonc_Bike_IV,  
    SA_nonc_Transit_Res_IV = SA_nonc_Transit - SA_nonc_Transit_IV,  
    SA_nonc_Car_Res_IV = `SA_nonc_Car_motor` - SA_nonc_Car_IV,  
    
    # SA per person  Mode
    SA_pp_Walk_IV = predict(stage1_walk_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_Bike_IV = predict(stage1_bike_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_Transit_IV = predict(stage1_transit_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_Car_IV = predict(stage1_car_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_Walk_Res_IV = SA_pp_Walk - SA_pp_Walk_IV,  
    SA_pp_Bike_Res_IV = SA_pp_Bike - SA_pp_Bike_IV,  
    SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV = SA_pp_Transit - SA_pp_Transit_IV,  
    SA_pp_Car_Res_IV = `SA_pp_Car_motor` - SA_pp_Car_IV,  
    
    # HT Mode
    HT_Walk_IV = predict(stage1_walk_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_Bike_IV = predict(stage1_bike_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_Transit_IV = predict(stage1_transit_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_Car_IV = predict(stage1_car_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_Walk_Res_IV = HT_Walk - HT_Walk_IV,  
    HT_Bike_Res_IV = HT_Bike - HT_Bike_IV,  
    HT_Transit_Res_IV = HT_Transit - HT_Transit_IV,  
    HT_Car_Res_IV = `HT_Car_motor` - HT_Car_IV,  
    
    # General
    SA_General_IV = predict(stage1_general_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_General_Res_IV = SA_General - SA_General_IV,  
    SA_nonc_General_IV = predict(stage1_general_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_General_Res_IV = SA_nonc_General - SA_nonc_General_IV,  
    SA_pp_General_IV = predict(stage1_general_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_General_Res_IV = SA_pp_General - SA_pp_General_IV,  
    HT_General_IV = predict(stage1_general_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_General_Res_IV = HT_General - HT_General_IV, 
    
    
    # Active
    SA_Active_IV = predict(stage1_active_SA, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_Active_Res_IV = SA_Active - SA_Active_IV, 
    SA_nonc_Active_IV = predict(stage1_active_SA_nonc, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_nonc_Active_Res_IV = SA_nonc_Active - SA_nonc_Active_IV, 
    SA_pp_Active_IV = predict(stage1_active_SA_pp, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    SA_pp_Active_Res_IV = SA_pp_Active - SA_pp_Active_IV, 
    HT_Active_IV = predict(stage1_active_HT, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    HT_Active_Res_IV = HT_Active - HT_Active_IV)
```

# Employment outcomes

```{r}
########################
##### 3 Modes Case #####
########################

linear_SA_3mode_formula <- as.formula(Outcome ~ 
                                # Spatial Availability variables
                                SA_pp_Active_IV +
                                SA_pp_Transit_IV +
                                SA_pp_Car_IV +

                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                #DriverLicense + #
                                TransitPass + 
                                #Paratransit + 
                                
                                # Socio and demographic variables
                                #Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                #Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                #twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                #Child_under_10 + 
                                 hh_size +
                                  hh_income + 
                                  Pop_density)

########################
##### 3 Modes Case #####
########################

linear_SA_4mode_formula <- as.formula(Outcome ~ 
                                # Spatial Availability variables
                                SA_pp_Walk_IV +
                                SA_pp_Bike_IV + 
                                SA_pp_Transit_IV +
                                SA_pp_Car_IV +

                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                #DriverLicense + #
                                TransitPass + 
                                #Paratransit + 
                                
                                # Socio and demographic variables
                                #Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                #Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                #twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                #Child_under_10 + 
                                 hh_size +
                                  hh_income + 
                                  Pop_density)

set.seed(51)
```

## Travel Too Long

```{r}
# Create survey design
design_TravelTooLong <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,  # No clustering
  weights = ~fexp_final,
  data = respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(TravelTooLong)))
```

```{r}
TravelTooLong_formula_3mode_lm_SA <- formula(update(linear_SA_3mode_formula, TravelTooLong ~ .))

TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA <- svyglm(TravelTooLong_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
                                   design = design_TravelTooLong)

summary(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA)
```

```{r}
model_selected <- TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA
design_select <- design_TravelTooLong
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(TravelTooLong_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
# second time cleaning 
model_selected <- model_selected_clean
design_select <- design_clean
```


```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(TravelTooLong_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
car::vif(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_clean <- model_selected_clean 
```

## Easy to Reach

To what extent do you agree with the following? “With the transport options available to me, I can easily participate/reach the following destinations:” Work

```{r}
# Create survey design
design_EasyToGo <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,  # No clustering
  weights = ~fexp_final,
  data = respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo)))
```

```{r}
EasyToGo_formula_3mode_lm_SA <- formula(update(linear_SA_3mode_formula, EasyToGo ~ .))

EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA <- svyglm(EasyToGo_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
                                   design = design_EasyToGo)
summary(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA)
```

```{r}
# first time cleaning
model_selected <- EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA
design_select <- design_EasyToGo
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(EasyToGo_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
# second time cleaning 
model_selected <- model_selected_clean
design_select <- design_clean
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(EasyToGo_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
car::vif(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_clean <- model_selected_clean
```

## Decline Employment

```{r}
# Create survey design
design_DeclineEmployment <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,  # No clustering
  weights = ~fexp_final,
  data = respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(DeclineEmployment)))
```


```{r}
DeclineEmployment_formula_3mode_lm_SA <- formula(update(linear_SA_3mode_formula, DeclineEmployment ~ .))

DeclineEmployment_linear_3modes <- svyglm(DeclineEmployment_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
                                   design = design_DeclineEmployment)

summary(DeclineEmployment_linear_3modes)
```

```{r}
# first time cleaning
model_selected <- DeclineEmployment_linear_3modes
design_select <- design_DeclineEmployment
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(DeclineEmployment_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
# second time cleaning
model_selected <- model_selected_clean
design_select <- design_clean
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```


```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(DeclineEmployment_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
car::vif(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_clean <- model_selected_clean
```

## Few Jobs 

```{r}
# Create survey design
design_FewJobs <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,  # No clustering
  weights = ~fexp_final,
  data = respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(FewJobs)))
```

```{r}
FewJobs_formula_3mode_lm_SA <- formula(update(linear_SA_3mode_formula, FewJobs ~ .))

FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA <- svyglm(FewJobs_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
                                   design = design_FewJobs)
summary(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA)
```

```{r}
# first time cleaning
model_selected <- FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA
design_select <- design_FewJobs
```

```{r}
cooksd <- cooks.distance(model_selected)

summary(cooksd)
hist(cooksd, breaks = 50, main = "Cook's Distance Distribution")

n <- nobs(model_selected)
k <- length(coef(model_selected))
threshold <- 4/(n - k - 1) # identifying influential points - rule of thumb: Cook's D > 4/(n - k - 1)

influential <- which(cooksd > threshold)
cat("Number of influential observations:", length(influential), "\n")
cat("Percentage:", round(length(influential)/n * 100, 2), "%\n")
```

```{r}
design_clean <- subset(design_select,
                                     !(seq_len(nrow(design_select$variables)) %in% influential))
```

```{r}
model_selected_clean <- svyglm(FewJobs_formula_3mode_lm_SA,
  design = design_clean)

summary(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
car::vif(model_selected_clean)
```

```{r}
FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_clean <- model_selected_clean
```

# Ordinal 

## Few jobs: Likert 

```{r}
complete_data_fj <- respondents %>%
  filter(!is.na(FewJobs_Likert)) %>%
  dplyr::select(FewJobs, FewJobs_Likert, fexp_final, SA_pp_Active, SA_pp_Transit, SA_pp_Car_motor, 
         CarNumber, BikeNumber, DriverLicense, Paratransit, TransitPass, Non_White, 
         LongTermConditions, Immigrant, Woman, Age, hh_size, 
         hh_income, Pop_density, SA_pp_Active_Res_IV, 
         SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV, SA_pp_Car_Res_IV) %>%
  na.omit() %>% 
  mutate(fexp_normalized = fexp_final / mean(fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE))

vars_to_scale <- c(
  "SA_pp_Active", "SA_pp_Transit", "SA_pp_Car_motor",
  "Pop_density",
  "SA_pp_Active_Res_IV", "SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV", "SA_pp_Car_Res_IV")

complete_data_scaled_fj <- complete_data_fj %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(vars_to_scale), 
                function(x) {
                  scaled <- scale(x)
                  return(as.numeric(scaled))
                }))

scale_centers_fj <- sapply(vars_to_scale, function(var) {
  attr(scale(complete_data_fj[[var]]), "scaled:center")
})

scale_scales_fj <- sapply(vars_to_scale, function(var) {
  attr(scale(complete_data_fj[[var]]), "scaled:scale")
})

ordinal_SA_3mode_formula <- as.formula(Outcome ~ 
                                # Spatial Availability variables
                                SA_pp_Active +
                                SA_pp_Transit +
                                SA_pp_Car_motor +

                                # Transport variables
                                CarNumber +  
                                BikeNumber + 
                                #DriverLicense + #
                                TransitPass + 
                                #Paratransit + 
                                
                                # Socio and demographic variables
                                #Indigenous + 
                                Non_White +  
                                #Temporary_or_refugee +  
                                LongTermConditions + 
                                Immigrant + 
                                Woman +   
                                #twoSTQI + 
                                Age +  
                                #Child_under_10 + 
                                hh_size +
                                hh_income + 
                                
                                # Environmental 
                                Pop_density + 
                                
                                # Causal-effect 
                                SA_pp_Active_Res_IV +
                                SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV +
                                SA_pp_Car_Res_IV)
```

```{r}
design_ordinal_norm_fj <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,
  weights = ~fexp_normalized,
  data = complete_data_scaled_fj)
```

```{r}
FewJobs_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA <- formula(update(ordinal_SA_3mode_formula, FewJobs_Likert ~ .))

FewJobs_ordinal_3modes <- svyolr(FewJobs_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA,
                                   design = design_ordinal_norm_fj)

summary(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes)
```

## Easy to Reach: Likert 

```{r}
complete_data_etg <- respondents %>%
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>%
  dplyr::select(EasyToGo, EasyToGo_Likert, fexp_final, SA_pp_Active, SA_pp_Transit, SA_pp_Car_motor, 
         CarNumber, BikeNumber, DriverLicense, Paratransit, TransitPass, Non_White, 
         LongTermConditions, Immigrant, Woman, Age, hh_size, 
         hh_income, Pop_density, SA_pp_Active_Res_IV, 
         SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV, SA_pp_Car_Res_IV)  %>%
  na.omit() %>% 
  mutate(fexp_normalized = fexp_final / mean(fexp_final, na.rm = TRUE))

complete_data_scaled_etg <- complete_data_etg %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(vars_to_scale), 
                function(x) {
                  scaled <- scale(x)
                  return(as.numeric(scaled))
                }))

scale_centers_etg <- sapply(vars_to_scale, function(var) {
  attr(scale(complete_data_etg[[var]]), "scaled:center")
})

scale_scales_etg <- sapply(vars_to_scale, function(var) {
  attr(scale(complete_data_etg[[var]]), "scaled:scale")
})
```

```{r}
design_ordinal_norm_etg <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,
  weights = ~fexp_normalized,
  data = complete_data_scaled_etg)
```

```{r}
EasyToGo_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA <- formula(update(ordinal_SA_3mode_formula, EasyToGo_Likert ~ .))

EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes <- svyolr(EasyToGo_formula_3mode_ordinal_SA,
                                   design = design_ordinal_norm_etg)

summary(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes)
```

# Visualizing probabilities 

Now, based on the relationship identified between accessibility and employment outcomes, we will identify some key thresholds to employment accessibility, focusing on the disadvantaged population. To do this, we need to control for other variables (indicators of non-accessibility) and vary the accessibility values in order to identify these key thresholds. The following chunks create a data frame with the median values (control) of the socioeconomic variables. 

How accessibility will vary: 

```{r}
seq_val <- seq(from = 0,
                      to = 1.25 * max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE),
                      by = 0.005)
```


```{r}
grid_all_vars <- as.data.frame(expand.grid("Mode" = c("Active","Transit","Car"),
                    "TransitPass" = unique(respondents$TransitPass),
                    "LongTermConditions" = unique(respondents$LongTermConditions),
                    "Woman" = unique(respondents$Woman),
                    "Non_White" = unique(respondents$Non_White),
                    "CarNumber" = c(0,1,2),
                    "hh_income" = unique(respondents$hh_income),
                    "Immigrant" = unique(respondents$Immigrant), 
                    "Value" = seq_val))

controls_all_vars <- data.frame(SA_pp_Active_IV = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Active_IV, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
                         SA_pp_Transit_IV = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit_IV, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
                   SA_pp_Car_IV = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Car_IV, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   SA_pp_Active = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Active, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   SA_pp_Transit = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   SA_pp_Car_motor = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Car_motor, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
                   Age = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$Age, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   hh_size = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$hh_size, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   BikeNumber = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$BikeNumber, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5),
                   Pop_density = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$Pop_density, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
                   SA_pp_Active_Res_IV = 0, 
                   SA_pp_Transit_Res_IV = 0, 
                   SA_pp_Car_Res_IV = 0)

grid_control_all_vars <- cbind(grid_all_vars, controls_all_vars)

cols_to_use <- c("TransitPass", "LongTermConditions", "Woman", "Non_White", "CarNumber", 
                                          "hh_income", "Immigrant")

grid_control_all_vars_ready <- grid_control_all_vars %>%
  mutate(SA_pp_Active_IV = if_else(Mode == "Active", Value, SA_pp_Active_IV),
         SA_pp_Transit_IV = if_else(Mode == "Transit", Value, SA_pp_Transit_IV),
         SA_pp_Car_IV = if_else(Mode == "Car", Value, SA_pp_Car_IV), 
         SA_pp_Active = if_else(Mode == "Active", Value, SA_pp_Active),
         SA_pp_Transit = if_else(Mode == "Transit", Value, SA_pp_Transit),
         SA_pp_Car_motor = if_else(Mode == "Car", Value, SA_pp_Car_motor), 
         Case = pmap_chr(dplyr::select(., all_of(cols_to_use)), ~ {
           values <- map_chr(list(...), as.character)
           str_c(cols_to_use, ": ", values, collapse = " - ")}))
```


```{r}
predict_subset <- data.frame()

for(mode in unique(grid_control_all_vars_ready$Mode)){
  for(grupo in unique(grid_control_all_vars_ready$Case)){
     
    df <- grid_control_all_vars_ready %>% 
          filter(Case == grupo, 
                 Mode == mode)
    
     # Travel Too Long

     pred_ttl <- predict(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_clean,
                               newdata = df,
                               type = "response",
                               se.fit = TRUE)

     pred_ttl <- as.data.frame(pred_ttl) %>%
            rename(Probability = response) %>%
       mutate(Outcome = "Travel too long") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))

     pred_ttl$Value <- seq_val

     # Easy to reach
     pred_etr <- predict(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_clean,
                               newdata = df,
                               type = "response",
                               se.fit = TRUE)

     pred_etr <- as.data.frame(pred_etr) %>%
            rename(Probability = response) %>%
       mutate(Outcome = "Easy to reach") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))

     pred_etr$Value <- seq_val

    # Declined employment
     pred_de <- predict(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_clean,
                               newdata = df,
                               type = "response",
                               se.fit = TRUE)

     pred_de <- as.data.frame(pred_de) %>%
            rename(Probability = response) %>%
       mutate(Outcome = "Declined employment") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))

     pred_de$Value <- seq_val

     # "Few jobs accessible"
     pred_fj <- predict(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_clean,
                               newdata = df,
                               type = "response",
                               se.fit = TRUE)

     pred_fj <- as.data.frame(pred_fj) %>%
            rename(Probability = response) %>%
       mutate(Outcome = "Few jobs accessible") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))

     pred_fj$Value <- seq_val
     
     # Ordinal: Few jobs accessible 
     
    df_scaled_fj <- df
      
    for(var in vars_to_scale){
          df_scaled_fj[[var]] <- (df[[var]] - scale_centers_fj[var]) / scale_scales_fj[var]
    }
        
    pred_fj_ord <- predict(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes, 
                             newdata = df_scaled_fj, 
                             SE = TRUE, 
                             type = "probs") 
    
    pred_fj_ord <- as.data.frame(pred_fj_ord)
    
    pred_fj_ord$Value <- seq_val 
    
    pred_fj_ord <- pred_fj_ord %>%  
        pivot_longer(cols = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"), 
                     names_to = "Likert", values_to = "Probability") %>% 
       mutate(Outcome = "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))
    
    # Ordinal: Easy to Reach 
    
    df_scaled_etg <- df
      
    for(var in vars_to_scale){
          df_scaled_etg[[var]] <- (df[[var]] - scale_centers_etg[var]) / scale_scales_etg[var]
    }
        
    pred_etr_ord <- predict(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes, 
                             newdata = df_scaled_etg, 
                             SE = TRUE, 
                             type = "probs") 
    
    pred_etr_ord <- as.data.frame(pred_etr_ord)
    
    pred_etr_ord$Value <- seq_val 
    
    pred_etr_ord <- pred_etr_ord %>%  
        pivot_longer(cols = c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral","Positive", "Most Positive"), 
                     names_to = "Likert", values_to = "Probability") %>% 
       mutate(Outcome = "Easy to reach - Ordinal") %>%
       mutate(Case = grupo,
              Mode = mode,
              TransitPass = unique(df$TransitPass),
              LongTermConditions = unique(df$LongTermConditions),
              Woman = unique(df$Woman),
              Non_White = unique(df$Non_White),
              CarNumber = unique(df$CarNumber),
              hh_income = unique(df$hh_income),
              Immigrant = unique(df$Immigrant))

     predict_subset <- predict_subset %>%
       dplyr::bind_rows(pred_ttl,
                        pred_etr,
                        pred_de,
                        pred_fj,
                        pred_fj_ord, 
                        pred_etr_ord)
  }
}

rownames(predict_subset) <- NULL
```

```{r}
#predict_subset <- readRDS(paste0(diretorio_export,"predictions.rds"))
```

```{r}
predict_subset <- predict_subset %>% 
  mutate(Model = case_when(
    is.na(SE) ~ "Ordinal",
    TRUE ~ "Linear"))
```

```{r}
outcome_order_linear <- c("Travel too long", 
                   "Easy to reach", 
                   "Declined employment", 
                   "Few jobs accessible")
my_colors_linear <- c("#66c2a5","#fc8d62","#8da0cb","#e78ac3")

names(my_colors_linear) <- outcome_order_linear

Likert_order <- c("Most Negative", "Negative", "Neutral", "Positive", "Most Positive")

my_colors_likert <- c("#d7191c", "#fdae61", "#bababa", "#a6d96a", "#1a9641")
names(my_colors_likert) <- Likert_order
```

```{r}
### Most disadvantaged case
# "TransitPass" = Yes,
# "LongTermConditions" = ,
# "Woman" = Yes,
# "Non_White" = Yes,
# "CarNumber" = 0,
# "hh_income" = "$30,000 to $60,000"
# "Immigrant" = Yes 

disadvantaged <- "TransitPass: No - LongTermConditions: Yes - Woman: Yes - Non_White: Yes - CarNumber: 0 - hh_income: Less than $30,000 - Immigrant: Yes"

### Most non-disadvantaged case
# "TransitPass" = Yes,
# "LongTermConditions" = No,
# "Woman" = No,
# "Non_White" = Yes,
# "CarNumber" = 2,
# "hh_income" = "More than 210,000"
# "Immigrant" = No 

non_disadvantaged <- "TransitPass: No - LongTermConditions: No - Woman: No - Non_White: No - CarNumber: 2 - hh_income: More than $210,000 - Immigrant: No"
```


## Linear cases 

```{r}
predict_subset_linear <- predict_subset %>% 
  filter(Model == "Linear")

predict_subset_linear_equity <- predict_subset %>% 
  filter(Model == "Linear",
         Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_linear_equity$Case)){
  Probabilities_equity <- predict_subset_linear_equity %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE), 
              alpha = 0.15, linetype = 0) +  
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/linear/all/", caso,"-equity-linear-all.jpg"),
       plot = Probabilities_equity,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/all/", disadvantaged,"-equity-linear-all.jpg"))
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/all/", non_disadvantaged,"-equity-linear-all.jpg"))
```

Calculate for all pop groups: 

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_linear$Case)){
  Probabilities <- predict_subset_linear %>%
  filter(Case == caso) %>%
  mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE),
              alpha = 0.15, linetype = 0) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/linear/all/", caso,"-linear-all.jpg"),
       plot = Probabilities,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

Significant cases: 

```{r}
signif_linear_models <- c("Few jobs accessible")

predict_subset_linear_sig  <- predict_subset_linear %>% 
  filter(Outcome %in% signif_linear_models)

predict_subset_linear_sig_equity <- predict_subset_linear_sig %>% 
  filter(Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_linear_sig_equity$Case)){
  probabilities_sig <- predict_subset_linear_sig_equity %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE), 
              alpha = 0.15, linetype = 0) +  
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/linear/sig/", caso,"-equity-linear-sig.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_sig,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```


```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/sig/", disadvantaged,"-equity-linear-sig.jpg"))
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/sig/", non_disadvantaged,"-equity-linear-sig.jpg"))
```

Calculate for all pop groups: 

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_linear_sig$Case)){
  probabilities_sig <- predict_subset_linear_sig %>%
  filter(Case == caso) %>%
  mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE),
              alpha = 0.15, linetype = 0) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/linear/sig/", caso,"-linear-sig.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_sig,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

Transit: 

```{r}
accessibility_lines_transit <- data.frame(Statistic = c("Median", "Maximum"),
  Value = c(Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
            max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE)))

median_sa_transit <- Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5)
max_sa_transit <- max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_sa_transit <- Hmisc::wtd.mean(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final)

predict_subset_standads_linear <- predict_subset_linear_sig_equity %>% 
  filter(Mode == "Transit") %>%  
    mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear), 
           Equity = case_when(Case == disadvantaged ~ "Most Disadvantaged",
                              Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Non-Disadvantaged"))

probabilities_transit_linear <- predict_subset_standads_linear %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE), 
              alpha = 0.10, linetype = 0) +  
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines_transit,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa_transit, y = 97, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa_transit, 2)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa_transit, y = 97, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa_transit, 2)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), 
                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa_transit)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/accessibility-effect-transit.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_transit_linear,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/accessibility-effect-transit.jpg"))
```

## Ordinal cases 

### Few jobs 

"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time" 

```{r}
predict_subset_ordinal_fj <- predict_subset %>% 
  # filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Few jobs accessible") %>% 
  filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal") %>%
mutate(Probability = Probability * 100)

predict_subset_ordinal_fj_equity <- predict_subset_ordinal_fj %>% 
  filter(Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_ordinal_fj_equity$Case)){
  probabilities_fj <- predict_subset_ordinal_fj_equity %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached per person",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Few jobs available", 
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 45), 
                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa_transit)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,"-equity-ordinal-fj.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_fj,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", disadvantaged,"-equity-ordinal-fj.jpg"))
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", non_disadvantaged,"-equity-ordinal-fj.jpg"))
```

For all population groups: 

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_ordinal_fj$Case)){
  probabilities_fj <- predict_subset_ordinal_fj %>%
  filter(Case == caso) %>%
  mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached per person",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Few jobs available",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100),
                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa_transit)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,"-ordinal-fj.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_fj,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

Just Transit: 

```{r}
predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit", 
         Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged), 
         Model == "Ordinal", 
         #Outcome == "Few jobs accessible"
         Outcome == "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal"
         ) %>%  
    mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order), 
           Equity = case_when(Case == disadvantaged ~ "Most Disadvantaged",
                              Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Non-Disadvantaged"), 
           Probability = Probability * 100)

probabilities_transit_linear_fj <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines_transit,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa_transit, y = Inf,
```
