```{r}
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa_transit, 2)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa_transit, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa_transit, 2)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit per person",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Few jobs available", 
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 60),
                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa_transit )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_transit_linear_fj,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"))
```

# Key Thresholds: Transit

Identifying key thresholds for transit accessibility: 

```{r}
##################################
##################################

outcome <- "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal" 
"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time"

##################################
##################################

standard_fj <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit",
         Outcome == outcome) %>%  
  mutate(Probability = Probability * 100) %>% 
  filter(Case == disadvantaged) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Value, Probability, Likert) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Likert, values_from = Probability)

# conservative_threshold <- round(median_sa[["50%"]],2)

# intermediate_threshold <-  standard_fj %>% 
conservative_threshold <-  standard_fj %>% 
  filter((`Positive` + `Most Positive` + `Neutral`) >= (`Most Negative` + `Negative`)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  pull(Value)

progressive_threshold <-  standard_fj %>% 
  filter((`Positive` + `Most Positive`) >= (`Most Negative` + `Negative` )) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  pull(Value)
```


```{r}
intermediate_threshold <- (progressive_threshold - conservative_threshold)/2 + conservative_threshold

# --- standards ---
conservative_threshold
intermediate_threshold
progressive_threshold
```

Identifying priority areas based on their transit accessibility gap: 

```{r}
priority_geo_areas <- census_tracts %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  left_join(accessibilities_wide, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(SA_pp_Transit)) %>% 
  group_by(CTUID) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(SA_pp_Transit = first(SA_pp_Transit, na_rm = TRUE),
               Weighted_Pop = Population) %>% 
  mutate(range_cons = conservative_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_prog = progressive_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_inte = intermediate_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         AFI_cons = range_cons * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_prog = range_prog * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_inte = range_inte * Weighted_Pop)

# Conservative threshold 
cons_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_cons > 0)

q2  <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

cons_classification <- cons_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_cons = case_when(AFI_cons > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_cons > q50 & AFI_cons <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_cons > q2  & AFI_cons <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_cons <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_cons)

# Progressive threshold 

prog_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_prog > 0)

q2  <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

prog_classification <- prog_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_prog = case_when(AFI_prog > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_prog > q50 & AFI_prog <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_prog > q2  & AFI_prog <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_prog <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_prog)

# Intermediate threshold 

inte_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_inte > 0)

q2  <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

inte_classification <- inte_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_inte = case_when(AFI_inte > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_inte > q50 & AFI_inte <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_inte > q2  & AFI_inte <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_inte <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_inte)


priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  left_join(cons_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(prog_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(inte_classification, by = "CTUID")
```

Calculating FGT measures:

```{r}
fgt_equity <- function(df, threshold) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <-
    df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
              Unweighted = n(), 
              fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
              fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2))

    fg <- mutate(headcount,
               Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
               fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               quant = threshold)
}

fgt_equity_intermediate <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                        threshold = intermediate_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Intermediate")

fgt_equity_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                               threshold = conservative_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_equity_progressive <- fgt_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                                                  threshold = progressive_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_priorities <- function(df, threshold, priority) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <- df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    group_by(.data[[priority]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
                            Unweighted = n(), 
      fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
      fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2),
      .groups = "drop")
  
  fg <- headcount %>% 
    mutate(Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
      fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      quant = threshold)
  
  return(fg)
}

fgt_prior_intermediate <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = intermediate_threshold,
  priority = "priority_inte") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_inte) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Intermediate")
  
fgt_prior_conservative <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = conservative_threshold,
  priority = "priority_cons") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_cons) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_prior_progressive <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = progressive_threshold,
  priority = "priority_prog") %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_prog) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_measures <- bind_rows(fgt_equity_intermediate, fgt_equity_conservative, fgt_equity_progressive,
                           fgt_prior_intermediate, fgt_prior_conservative, fgt_prior_progressive) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(priority)) 
```

Plotting graphs of FGT measures: 

```{r}
plot_fgt_data <-  fgt_measures %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(fgt0, fgt1, fgt2)) %>%
  mutate(name = ifelse(name == "fgt0", "FGT-0",
                ifelse(name == "fgt1", "FGT-1", "FGT-2")), 
         pop = "Population")

priority_order <- c("General", 
                   "Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#525252","#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
plot_fgt <- plot_fgt_data %>% 
  mutate(priority = factor(priority, levels = priority_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Threshold, x = value, fill = priority)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.70, pch=21, colour = "black")  + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ name) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab(NULL) + 
  ylab(NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = plot_fgt, 
          filename = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"FGT_plots.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/FGT_plots.jpg"))
```

Plotting priority areas for each standard: 

```{r}
priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>%
   mutate(priority_cons = replace_na(priority_cons, "No deficit"),
          priority_prog = replace_na(priority_prog, "No deficit"),
          priority_inte = replace_na(priority_inte, "No deficit"))

priority_geo_areas_long_a <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("AFI_cons", "AFI_prog", "AFI_inte"),
               names_to = c("AFI_type"), 
               values_to  ="AFI_value") %>%
  mutate(AFI_type = case_when(AFI_type == 'AFI_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>%
    dplyr::select("CTUID","AFI_type", "AFI_value")

  
priority_geo_areas_long_b <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("priority_cons", "priority_prog", "priority_inte"),
               names_to = c("Priority_type"), 
               values_to  = "Priority_value") %>%
  mutate(Priority_type = case_when(Priority_type == 'priority_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>% 
      dplyr::select("CTUID","Priority_type", "Priority_value")


priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long_a %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas_long_b, 
            by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID", 
                   "AFI_type" = "Priority_type")) %>% 
  distinct(CTUID, AFI_type, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  full_join(census_tracts, by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID"))

priority_order <- c("Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  mutate(Priority_value = factor(Priority_value, levels = priority_order), 
                  pcd_label = case_when(PCD == "3518" ~ "Durham", 
                               PCD == "3519" ~ "York", 
                               PCD == "3520" ~ "Toronto", 
                               PCD == "3521" ~ "Peel", 
                               PCD == "3524" ~ "Halton", 
                               PCD == "3525" ~ "Hamilton")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AFI_type)) %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts))


priority_plot <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "AFI_type",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities.jpg"))
```


```{r}
conservative_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"))
```

```{r}
conservative_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"))
```


```{r}
progressive_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", progressive_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"))
```

```{r}
progressive_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", progressive_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"))
```

# Saving model files 

```{r}
saveRDS(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach.rds"))
saveRDS(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employments.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(predict_subset, paste0(diretorio_export,"predictions.rds"))
```

```{r}
fgt_measures <- fgt_measures %>% 
  dplyr::select("priority", "Threshold", "quant", "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0_toSum", "fgt1_toSum", "fgt2_toSum", 
                "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0", "fgt1", "fgt2", "Unweighted")

write.csv(fgt_measures, paste0(diretorio_export, "fgt_measures.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
 census_tracts_export <- census_tracts %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  mutate(Conservative = conservative_threshold, 
         Intermediate = intermediate_threshold,
         Progressive = progressive_threshold)

sf::st_write(census_tracts_export, paste0(diretorio_export, "census_tract_with_priorities.gpkg"), append = FALSE)
```
